scheduler.schedule.sagemakerpipelinepara: The templated target type for the Amazon SageMaker [https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sagemaker/latest/APIReference/API_StartPipelineExecution.html](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sagemaker/latest/APIReference/API_StartPipelineExecution.html) API operation.
